# ScanFast.online — Workspace Instructions

All agents working in this workspace MUST read `.internal/plan.md` before writing any code.

## Quick Rules

- **No database.** In-memory Svelte stores only.
- **No external runtime dependencies.** All assets self-hosted.
- **IBM Carbon design system only.**
- **TypeScript strict.** JSDoc on all exports.
- **Mobile-first.** Works at 320px.
- **Max 20 pages per session.**
- **Agents update `.internal/progress.md`** after completing any task.
